The '''Murgo Choke''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connecting the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] to the [[Rago Run]]. It passed between two [[Binary star/Legends|binary systems]]: one consisting of a yellow and an orange star, the other of a [[Blue giant/Legends|blue giant]] and a [[Red dwarf/Legends|crimson dwarf]]. The intense [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] wells exerted by the four stars prevented any sort of hyperspace travel, hence the name "Murgo Choke". It was the site of a [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|battle]] during the [[Swarm War]].
